headline: RTX SeaRAM Win And Radar Expansion Refresh Defense And Valuation Story
summary: RTX (NYSE:RTX) has received a new multi-year contract to supply SeaRAM ship self-defense systems for Australia's Sea3000 General Purpose Frigate program. This marks the first use of SeaRAM technology on Australian frigates and expands RTX's presence in international naval defense. Collins Aerospace, an RTX business, is investing $26.5 million to expand its Largo, Florida radar facility to support both commercial aviation and defense programs.
